meaning: n.归还,复位,交换,代替者,补充兵员,置换,移位
examples: We need to find a replacement for Sue.
She will continue in her present job until a replacement can be found.
It is a delicious replacement for plastic ones.
Their only try came six minutes from the end when replacement scrum-half Colin Ellis crossed.
The proposed replacement building was not of sufficient merit to justify the loss of the public house.
